title: Course
description: Implementation of the 'Course' model. A course.

Description.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

Notes.description: Any notes that have been written about the course.
Notes.example: Example note for Mindbody Public API.

StartDate.description: Date and time that the course starts.

EndDate.description: Date and time that the course ends.

Organizer.description: Contains information about the staff member in charge of organizing the event.

Program.description: Contains information about the service category to which the course belongs.

ImageUrl.description: The URL of the image associated with this course, if one exists.
